examples: Better be careful of your bookish approach, comrade.
Most of the goats ran away from their rough comrade.
We can't remain indifferent when any comrade is in difficulty.
In 1961, Tunisian agents murdered a former comrade of Mr Bourguiba, Salah Ben Youssef, in Frankfurt.
He died in an explosion in Helmand province helping a wounded comrade, who survived.
